--- title: "⌛ Time's up! Thank you all for your great submissions! 🎉" date: 2025-11-12 categories: - interventions - submissions draft: false image: "../../images/sunrise.jpg" title-block-banner-color: white --- ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: 🌍🔬 Thank you all for submitting your fantastic intervention proposals to our Strengthening Trust in Climate Scientists Megastudy! 💪 You’ve exceeded even our most optimistic expectations --- we received 105^[Initially, we've received 107 proposals, but two got retracted from the respective authors shortly after the submission deadline.] intervention proposals from 80 different research teams^[some "teams" are actually individual researchers---24 of the 105 submissions are single-authored] (25 teams submitted two interventions), from 65 different institutions. ::: {.cell} ::: 💚 We’re especially proud that so many submissions came from early-career researchers who want to strengthen trust in science. ::: {#tbl-career-stage .cell tbl-cap='Number of submissions by career stage of contributors.'} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
position n_submissions
Postdoc 35
Graduate Student/PhD Student 34
Principle investigator/Professor 27
Research Assistant 2
Researcher 2
lecturer 2
Adjunct Research Fellow 1
Associate Professor 1
Guest Researcher (postdoc) 1
``` ::: ::: 🕵 Our advisory board will now begin reviewing all interventions. The process is fully anonymized --- only the research lead (Jan) can link submissions to their authors, and cannot participate in the voting. 🗓 We expect the review and selection process to be completed by mid-December. Stay tuned for updates!️ To end with a little fun fact: Since we received a couple of apologies for late submissions --- don't feel bad, you're not alone, it really happens to (almost) all of us (@fig-submissions-by-day) 😅: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Submissions by days until deadline.](index_files/figure-html/fig-submissions-by-day-1.png){#fig-submissions-by-day width=672} ::: ::: Once again, a huge thank you to everyone who contributed to this collaborative effort. Your expertise, creativity, and collaborative spirit make this project possible. 💫 --- 🔗 **More information** For more information about the project and the team, visit [our website](../../index.qmd). 💌 Questions? Email us anytime at [{{< var email >}}](mailto:{{< var email >}})
